llm.comment: Optimized for RTX 3080: 16k context (qwen3:8b supports 128k, RTX 3080 handles 16-32k easily), timeout in seconds, rate limiting per minute

cache.comment: max_size_mb: Maximale Cache-Größe in MB (LRU-Eviction), clear_on_startup: false = Cache bleibt erhalten

osint.comment: OSINT settings: max_results für site: Suchen (25 max, DuckDuckGo liefert manchmal nur 10), limits für Email/Phone/General OSINT pro Stunde, safesearch: off/moderate/strict (strict verbessert Ergebnisqualität)

memory.comment: Memory Store settings: auto_clear_on_clear=false (persists across clear), max_entries für Warnung, max_file_size_mb für Größen-Limit

hallucination_detection.comment: Hallucination Detection: enabled=false (default off for performance), detection_level: low/medium/high, warning_mode: silent/log/flag_response/block

paths.comment: Configurable paths for data storage - all paths relative to project root

context_limits.comment: Token limits for different context sizes - adjust based on your GPU/model capabilities
